summary: Fixed the simplicity-veto finding from the previous review by extracting a private tagFindingWithLabel() helper in flows.mjs. Both tagSimplicityFinding() and mergeReviewFindings() now delegate to it, eliminating the duplicated emoji-splice pattern previously inline at flows.mjs:186-191. Simplicity 🔴 findings continue to appear as [simplicity veto] in combined output for both build-verify and multi-review flows; 596/596 tests pass.
